MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Kevin Lee, CSR Not On The Record , D501
Appearances:
Attorney Tiffany Norman, Esq. of TRN Law Associates (415) 8234566, counsel for Plaintiff
Attorney Ofunne N. Edoziem, Esq. of Perkins Cole LLP (310) 788-9900, counsel for Defendant - Present through Court Call

Hearing Re Temporary Restraining Order To Postpone A Non-Judicial Foreclosure And Order to show cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction

The Court mandates the plaintiff post $5,910.58 with the Court by June 26, 2015. Court orders that the defendant provide supplemental briefs by July 23, 2015 and that the plaintiff respond by July 30, 2015. The pleadings shall be no more than 10 pages.

Continued to August 6, 2015 at 09:30am for Hearing Re Temporary Restraining Order To Postpone A Non-Judicial Foreclosure And Order to show cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction

Plaintiff to prepare the order and both sides waive notice.

Tro To Postpone A Non-Judicial Foreclosure And Osc Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jun-15-2015 Continued To Jun-19-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Tro To Postpone A Non-Judicial Foreclosure And Osc Re Preliminary Injunction is continued to June 19, 2015 on Court's own motion. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)
